Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Requires the Port Authority of New York and New Jersey take steps to update noise exposure maps
Summary: Requires the Port Authority of New York and New Jersey take steps to update noise exposure maps and take steps to reduce noise pollution around certain covered airports; defines covered airports.
LawSection: Port Authority of New York and New Jersey
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to requiring the port authority of New York and New Jersey to regularly update airport noise exposure maps for airports under its jurisdiction
